_comment: dialogue_brondrakhold.json: This table is used for the npc chat in Brondrak Hold.

dialogue.greeting: Welcome to Brondrak Hold. Mind the embers and speak with purpose.
dialogue.help: If you’ve the strength and skill, lend your hammer to the forges or your blade to the watch.
dialogue.lore: This hold was carved during the Age of Flame, and its forges have never gone cold.
dialogue.farewell: May your steel stay true and your fire never fade.

dialogue.greeting: The Flame blesses those who serve with faith and fire.
dialogue.help: We need more hands to sanctify the lower halls. Dark things stir beneath.
dialogue.lore: The Eternal Forge is not just fire—it is divine will made manifest.
dialogue.farewell: Go with the Flame, and return with purpose.

dialogue.greeting: Steel and stone, that’s what we’re made of here.
dialogue.help: There’s a tunnel breach in the east shaft. We need fighters, not talkers.
dialogue.lore: The Ironclad Brotherhood was born in these halls, forged in war and oath.
